sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ الْوَلَدُ يَاسِرٌ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ السِّبَاحَةَ.
sentences.translation: Dječak Jasir je htio naučiti plivati.
sentences.translationEn: The boy Yasir wanted to learn to swim.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى الْمَسْبَحِ مَعَ أَبِيهِ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Svake sedmice je išao u bazen sa ocem.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the swimming pool with his father every week.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْبِدَايَةِ خَافَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لَكِنَّهُ لَمْ يَتَوَقَّفْ.
sentences.translation: U početku se bojao vode ali nije odustao.
sentences.translationEn: At first he was afraid of the water but he did not stop.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ شَهْرٍ سَبَحَ بِمُفْرَدِهِ وَصَفَّقَ أَبُوهُ لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Nakon mjeseca je plivao sam i otac mu je pljeskao.
sentences.translationEn: After a month he swam alone and his father applauded him.
